build.files: about.html, cv.html, earth.html, feed_yourself.html, health_tracker.html, index.html, quill.html, repos.html

build._doc: Inject single-namespace observability SDK (Sentry/OpenObserve-style). Mirrors console.* + errors + SW lifecycle to OPFS console.log. window.consoleLogs.{captureException, captureMessage, addBreadcrumb, read, readJSON, tail, clear, download}.
build.files: about.html, cv.html, earth.html, feed_yourself.html, health_tracker.html, index.html, quill.html, repos.html

build._doc: MUST run last — hashes the dist artifacts above to derive BUILD_HASH and inject it into the SW bundle.
